stance_taxonomy.recognition: treats PA / Eltern-Kind-Entfremdung / aliénation parentale / alienazione genitoriale / ouderverstoting as a real, assessable phenomenon; operates or endorses PA-specific assessment, expert-witness or reunification work; typically PASG-aligned
stance_taxonomy.critique: argues the PA construct (especially Gardner's SAP) is operationalised against DV / coercive-control survivors; advocates DV/trauma-informed alternatives and tighter regulation
stance_taxonomy.middle: engages both alienating-behaviour and family-violence frames; differential-diagnosis or systemic / multi-family approach; not aligned with PASG and not in the abolitionist critique camp

eu_context_notes.DE: Approbation issued by Land authority; psychotherapists listed by Land Psychotherapeutenkammer (e.g. https://www.lpk-bw.de/). BVerfG 1 BvR 1076/23 (2023) caps PA-driven custody transfers (see /case-studies/).
eu_context_notes.FR: Ordre national des médecins (RPPS https://annuaire.sante.fr); ADELI / RPS for psychologists; court-appointed experts on Cour d'appel lists. Cass. 1re Civ. 12-14.392 (2013) caution against routine SAP findings (see /case-studies/).
eu_context_notes.ES: Colegio Oficial de Psicólogos (COP) regional; OMC for psychiatrists. 2020 Ministry of Equality informe institutionally rejects SAP. STS 519/2017 leading critical Supreme Court ruling.
eu_context_notes.IT: Ordine degli Psicologi regional (e.g. Lazio https://ordinepsicologilazio.it/); FNOMCeO for physicians. Cass. ord. 9691/2022 (Massaro) and ord. 4595/2025 hold PA is not a clinically validated construct binding judges.
eu_context_notes.NL: BIG-register (Wet BIG https://www.bigregister.nl/) for Klinisch psycholoog / Psychotherapeut. HR 15 Feb 2005 ECLI:NL:HR:2005:AR8250 leading SC ruling on contact-withholding.
eu_context_notes.BE: Commission des psychologues / Psychologencommissie https://www.compsy.be/. No Belgian appellate ruling has fully endorsed SAP; mixed clinical doctrine.

ca_therapists: Hubert Van Gijseghem PhD — Belgian-born Quebec-based; full entry in /practitioners-ca-therapists.md; cross-listed under FR section here
us_therapists: William Bernet, Amy Baker, Richard Warshak, Linda Gottlieb — full entries in /practitioners-us-therapists.md; Verrocchio (IT) and Tejedor (ES) are principal European co-authors with Baker / Bernet

practitioners.name: Dr Wilfrid von Boch-Galhau, MD
practitioners.practice: Independent psychiatric / psychotherapeutic practice, Oberer Dallenbergweg 15, 97082 Würzburg; co-founder PAS-Arbeitsgemeinschaft; founding member Parental Alienation Study Group (PASG)
practitioners.regulatory_body: Approbation as Facharzt für Psychiatrie, Psychosomatische Medizin und Psychotherapie (Bayerische Landesärztekammer https://www.blaek.de/)
practitioners.specialty: Psychiatry / psychosomatic medicine / psychotherapy; long-term mental-health sequelae of parent-child alienation in adult children of high-conflict divorce; PA as psychological child abuse
practitioners.stance_source: Boch-Galhau (2018) Parental Alienation – A serious form of psychological child abuse, Mental Health and Family Medicine 13:725-739 https://www.gavinpublishers.com/article/view/parental-alienation-a-serious-form-of-child-psychological-abuse-a-worldwide-health-problem ; Boch-Galhau (2013) German-language monograph (VWB) https://www.amazon.de/Parental-Alienation-Syndrome-Disorder-Kindesmisshandlung/dp/3861351781 ; co-translator/editor of Gardner (2002) into German; co-organiser International PAS Conference Frankfurt 2002; founding member PASG https://www.pasg.info/
programs_or_publications: Boch-Galhau & Kodjoe (2006) chapter in International Handbook of PAS (Charles C Thomas)
Boch-Galhau (2013) German-language monograph Parental Alienation und Parental Alienation Syndrome/Disorder (VWB, ISBN 978-3-86135-178-2)
Boch-Galhau (2018) peer-reviewed PA-as-child-abuse paper
Founding member PASG
practitioners.primary_contact: Practice tel +49 931 359 2133, Oberer Dallenbergweg 15, 97082 Würzburg — verify current activity; ResearchGate https://www.researchgate.net/scientific-contributions/Wilfrid-von-Boch-Galhau-2021148597
practitioners.hook: German-speaking world's most prolific PA clinician-author; the standard German monograph is his. Cross-listed in /influencers/wilfrid-von-boch-galhau.md.
practitioners.notes: Older practice site (drvboch.de) intermittent; activity status (active/semi-retired) not publicly confirmed in 2024-2026.

practitioners.name: Dipl-Psych Ursula Kodjoe
practitioners.practice: Independent practice in mediation, systemic family therapy and PA-related expert consulting, Emmendingen; long-standing freelance consultant (until 2005) to Bundesministerium der Justiz and French Ministère de la Justice on international child-custody disputes
practitioners.regulatory_body: Diplom-Psychologin + Diplom-Sozialpädagogin (pre-2020 PsychThG); systemic family therapist and mediator; Land Approbation/chamber not publicly displayed
practitioners.specialty: PA / Eltern-Kind-Entfremdung; international child-abduction mediation; expert testimony; consensus model for early intervention
practitioners.stance_source: PASG Nordic Conference Stockholm 2018 presentation Consensus Model in Germany; co-author 2011 PA/PAS Update with Boch-Galhau, Andritzky, Koeppel https://oudervervreemding.wordpress.com/2011/11/01/27/ ; Jugendamtwatch interview http://jugendamtwatch.blogspot.com/2014/04/pas-ursula-kodjoe-dipl-psychologin-zu.html ; Vaeternotruf https://www.vaeternotruf.de/ursula-kodjoe.htm ; NZZ profile https://www.nzz.ch/gesellschaft/eltern-kind-entfremdung-wie-ein-vater-um-seine-tochter-kaempft-ld.1776632
programs_or_publications: Co-author 2011 PA/PAS Update with Boch-Galhau, Andritzky, Koeppel
Co-author 2006 chapter (with Boch-Galhau) in International Handbook of PAS
PASG Stockholm 2018 and Brussels 2021 presenter on the Cochemer Praxis consensus model
practitioners.primary_contact: LinkedIn DM https://de.linkedin.com/in/ursula-kodjoe-b2815340 ; Emmendingen practice — street address not publicly confirmed
practitioners.hook: German-language clinical bridge between recognition camp and inter-ministerial mediation work; natural German pairing with Boch-Galhau.
practitioners.notes: PASG board membership claim in brief is unverified from PASG's public board page; she is a recurring speaker / contributing expert — treat as PASG-aligned senior expert.

practitioners.name: Prof Dr Ursula Gresser
practitioners.practice: Private practice for medical-scientific expert assessments, Munich (since 2009); formerly LMU München Medizinische Poliklinik 1984-1996; Springer Heidelberg medical director 1996-1998; academic supervisor LMU
practitioners.regulatory_body: Approbation as Fachärztin für Innere Medizin und Rheumatologie (Bayerische Landesärztekammer); academic title Prof. via LMU; NOT a psychiatrist/psychotherapist
practitioners.specialty: Internal medicine / rheumatology; medical-scientific expert reports; secondary research focus on somatic and psychiatric long-term health consequences of Kontaktabbruch — PA framed as public-health problem
practitioners.stance_source: Gresser (2015) Macht Kontaktabbruch zu den leiblichen Eltern Kinder krank? Eine Literaturanalyse, NZFam 989 ff. — discussion https://www.buerokratischer-kindes-missbrauch.de/home/wissenschaftliche-basis-bkm-drei-mal-schlimmer-als-der-tod/gresser-studie/ ; Archeviva interview http://www.archeviva.com/kooperationen/offener-bereich/gresser-prof-dr-ursula/weltweite-studien-ueber-gesundheitliche-folgen-fuer-kid-eke-pas-kinder/ ; Vaeternotruf summary https://www.vaeternotruf.de/kontaktabbruch.htm
programs_or_publications: Gresser (2015) NZFam 989 ff. literature analysis of health consequences
Publications page https://www.ursula-gresser.de/publikationen.html
Numerous Gutachten in German family-court proceedings on health consequences of contact-rupture
practitioners.primary_contact: Contact form via https://www.ursula-gresser.de/ (Munich)
practitioners.hook: German PA-recognition camp's principal public-health-evidence voice; not a psychiatrist, frames PA in somatic morbidity/mortality data. Cite against 'PA is not a real diagnosis' lines.
practitioners.notes: Gresser's work contested by mainstream German psychiatry; use as evidence of somatic risk not as a forensic diagnosis. Read against BVerfG 1 BvR 1076/23 (2023).

practitioners.name: Dr phil Walter Andritzky
practitioners.practice: Independent psychologist / sociologist; long-time author on psychosocial diagnostics of alienating parents and Jugendamt role in custody assessment
practitioners.regulatory_body: Diplom-Psychologe (German diploma psychologist) + sociologist (PhD); regulatory chamber not publicly confirmed (independent author)
practitioners.specialty: Personality-structure and behavioural patterns of alienating parents; Jugendamt role; ethnopsychology
practitioners.stance_source: Andritzky (2002) Verhaltensmuster und Persönlichkeitsstruktur entfremdender Eltern, Psychotherapie 7(2):166-182 https://eltern-kind-entfremdung.eu/wp-content/uploads/Artikel-Jugendamt-PSYCHIATRIEZTSCHR.pdf ; Andritzky (2002) Nicht instrumentalisieren, Deutsches Ärzteblatt; Wikipedia https://de.wikipedia.org/wiki/Eltern-Kind-Entfremdung
programs_or_publications: Andritzky (2002) Psychotherapie article on alienating parents' personality structure
Andritzky (2002) Deutsches Ärzteblatt warning against professional instrumentalisation
Co-author 2011 PA/PAS Update with Boch-Galhau, Kodjoe, Koeppel
practitioners.primary_contact: No public practice URL or current address found — outreach via Familie & Familienrecht archive or PAS-AG channels
practitioners.hook: Cite his 2002 Ärzteblatt warning to show the recognition camp itself warned against professional capture.
practitioners.notes: Current activity / retirement status not publicly confirmed. Historical-literature contributor.

practitioners.name: Dr Maurice Berger
practitioners.practice: Pédopsychiatre; active in psychiatric practice (consultant centre éducatif renforcé + Centre Médical de l'Argentière since 2014); former chef de service psychiatrie de l'enfant CHU Saint-Étienne 1989-2014; former professeur associé Université Lyon II 1992-2003; psychanalyste; creator of DIU Expertise judiciaire en psychiatrie de l'enfant Paris-Cité
practitioners.regulatory_body: Ordre national des médecins — spécialité psychiatrie / pédopsychiatrie (RPPS searchable at https://annuaire.sante.fr)
practitioners.specialty: Pédopsychiatrie; visites médiatisées (coined the term); placement of extremely violent children; expert testimony in custody/family-violence cases; critique of SAP / aliénation parentale framings as dangerous in family-violence contexts
practitioners.stance_source: Berger (2017) Le syndrome d'aliénation parentale : un concept dangereux http://mauriceberger.net/wpmaurice/wp-content/uploads/2017/09/Le-syndrome-dalie%CC%81nation-parentale-06-2017.pdf and https://www.mauriceberger.net/le-syndrome-dalienation-parentale-un-concept-dangereux/ ; YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4khrxcg6Xqs ; Berger in Séparation conflictuelle des parents (synthesis https://www.village-justice.com/articles/separation-conflictuelle-des-parents-quel-mode-garde-pour-enfant-synthese-livre,46396.html); Empan (2009) https://shs.cairn.info/revue-empan-2009-1-page-31 ; CERE synthesis https://www.cere-asbl.be/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/9_alie_nation-parentale_sap_ok.pdf
programs_or_publications: 19 books, 107 peer-reviewed articles, 332+ international conferences (per CV)
Le syndrome d'aliénation parentale : un concept dangereux (2017)
Séparation conflictuelle des parents. Quel mode de garde pour l'enfant ?
Architect of visite médiatisée concept used in French family-court practice
DIU Expertise judiciaire en psychiatrie de l'enfant (Paris-Cité)
practitioners.primary_contact: Contact form via https://www.mauriceberger.net/ ; Centre Médical de l'Argentière (Lyon); no direct email/phone on CV
practitioners.hook: France's most prolific senior pédopsychiatre on the critique side of the SAP debate; natural French counterpart to Joan Meier (US) or Adrienne Barnett (UK).
practitioners.notes: Critique anchored in DV-protective and child-violence work, not in abolitionist tradition — clinically rather than ideologically motivated.

practitioners.name: Dr Paul Bensussan
practitioners.practice: Psychiatre; expert agréé par la Cour de cassation (since 2007); expert près la Cour d'appel de Versailles (since 1996); expert auprès de la CPI/ICC La Haye (since 2011); private practice Versailles
practitioners.regulatory_body: Ordre national des médecins — spécialité psychiatrie (RPPS searchable at https://annuaire.sante.fr); liste nationale des experts agréés par la Cour de cassation
practitioners.specialty: Forensic psychiatry; sexual-offender assessment (notably Outreau); criminal responsibility of mentally-ill offenders; expert-witness work in aliénation parentale cases including disputed CSA allegations in custody disputes
practitioners.stance_source: Personal practice site frames PA expertise https://www.paulbensussan.fr/biographie-cv ; April 2022 complaint by four French child-protection associations to the Conseil de l'Ordre des médecins alleging invariable SAP conclusions — Causette https://www.causette.fr/societe/en-france/syndrome-dalienation-parentale-les-expertises-judiciaires-du-psychiatre-paul-bensussan-dans-le-viseur-dassociations and Enfance & Jeunesse Infos https://www.enfancejeunesseinfos.fr/quatre-associations-deposent-un-recours-contre-lexpert-psychiatre-paul-bensussan-partisan-du-syndrome-dalienation-parentale/ ; Wikipédia https://fr.wikipedia.org/wiki/Paul_Bensussan
programs_or_publications: La Dictature de l'émotion (co-author)
Numerous expert reports cited in French press in CSA / custody-overlap cases
Active public campaign (unsuccessful) for SAP/PAD recognition in DSM-5
practitioners.primary_contact: Contact via https://www.paulbensussan.fr/ ; practice in Versailles — specific street address/phone not publicly displayed
practitioners.hook: France's most visible PA-recognition expert witness, centre of ongoing professional-conduct complaint — flashpoint figure.
practitioners.notes: Active Conseil de l'Ordre disciplinary complaint (2022→) is the principal current news item. Use cautiously for outreach.

practitioners.name: Dr Roland Broca
practitioners.practice: Psychiatre honoraire des hôpitaux; former chef de service et d'intersecteur de psychiatrie générale et de psychiatrie de l'enfant et de l'adolescent; psychoanalyst; private practice 29 Avenue Rapp, 75007 Paris
practitioners.regulatory_body: Ordre national des médecins — spécialité psychiatrie (RPPS searchable at https://annuaire.sante.fr)
practitioners.specialty: Psychiatrie générale; psychanalyse; parental guidance in high-conflict separations; clinical analysis of parental alienation in conflictual separations
practitioners.stance_source: Broca & Odinetz, Séparations conflictuelles et aliénation parentale : Enfants en danger (Chronique Sociale, 3rd ed. 2023) https://www.lgdj.fr/separations-conflictuelles-et-alienation-parentale-9782367177724.html ; co-author Olga Odinetz is founding president of ACALPA https://www.acalpa.info/ ; practice site PA section http://www.roland-broca.com/alienation-parentale
programs_or_publications: Broca & Odinetz (2023, 3rd ed.) Séparations conflictuelles et aliénation parentale — standard French recognition-camp clinician handbook
Blog Articles archive http://www.roland-broca.com/blog
ACALPA partnership
practitioners.primary_contact: 29 Avenue Rapp, 75007 Paris ; contact form on http://www.roland-broca.com/ ; Keskeces listing https://www.keskeces.com/medecin/roland-broca-75007-paris.html
practitioners.hook: Principal French psychiatrist on recognition side actively in private practice in Paris; natural recognition counterpart to Berger.
practitioners.notes: Civil-society linkage through Odinetz/ACALPA gives clean outreach pathway via association rather than direct practice.

practitioners.name: Dr Marie-France Hirigoyen
practitioners.practice: Psychiatre, psychanalyste, thérapeute familiale, victimologue; chercheuse associée Université Paris V; private practice Paris 5e (45+ years); originator of French harcèlement moral legal concept (loi du 17 janvier 2002)
practitioners.regulatory_body: Ordre national des médecins — spécialité psychiatrie (RPPS searchable at https://annuaire.sante.fr)
practitioners.specialty: Psychiatrie, psychanalyse; violence perverse, harcèlement moral, emprise; family-systems therapy; victimologie; recent work on séparations avec enfants (PA-adjacent)
practitioners.stance_source: Hirigoyen (2022/2023) Séparations avec enfants (La Découverte); Le Harcèlement moral (La Découverte 1998) https://www.editionsladecouverte.fr/le_harcelement_moral-9782707141675 ; Wikipédia https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Marie-France_Hirigoyen ; Cairn https://shs.cairn.info/publications-de-marie-france-hirigoyen--40102?lang=fr ; Médias Citoyens Diois profile https://mediascitoyens-diois.info/2024/04/marie-france-hirigoyen-une-psy-a-lecoute-des-blessures-invisibles/
programs_or_publications: Le Harcèlement moral (1998) — source-book of French harcèlement moral law (450k copies, 24 translations)
Séparations avec enfants (2022/2023) — PA-adjacent without endorsing Gardner
25+ years private psychiatric practice Paris 5e
practitioners.primary_contact: Via PUF / La Découverte editorial channels; private practice Paris 5e — specific address/phone not publicly displayed
practitioners.hook: French emprise / coercive-control bridge figure — engages PA dynamics without entering the Gardner camp.
practitioners.notes: Does not endorse SAP; works in coercive-control register closer to Stark/Dijkstra than to Gardner.

practitioners.name: Dr Jean-François Le Goff
practitioners.practice: Hospital psychiatrist (ret.); former chef de service EPS de Ville-Évrard (La Courneuve/Dugny/Stains sectors); family therapist since 1974 (Buber/Bakhtin tradition); AFTA and IFTA member
practitioners.regulatory_body: Ordre national des médecins — spécialité psychiatrie (RPPS searchable at https://annuaire.sante.fr); current registration status not publicly confirmed
practitioners.specialty: Family therapy; parentification (Boszormenyi-Nagy tradition); contextual therapy; intergenerational dynamics
practitioners.stance_source: Le Goff, L'enfant, parent de ses parents : Parentification et thérapie familiale (L'Harmattan) https://www.amazon.fr/Lenfant-parent-ses-parents-parentification/dp/2738484786 ; cited in PMC review https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC9568140/ ; no PA-specific peer-reviewed paper in French confirmed
programs_or_publications: L'enfant, parent de ses parents — French standard on parentification (PA-adjacent)
Member AFTA and IFTA
practitioners.primary_contact: Via Érès / L'Harmattan editorial channels — no direct practice contact publicly listed
practitioners.hook: Useful when an article needs a non-PA clinical frame (parentification) describing the same triangulation dynamic.
practitioners.notes: Current activity / retirement status not publicly confirmed. Parentification is the most-used French clinical alternative to SAP framing.

practitioners.name: Dr Asunción Tejedor Huerta, PhD
practitioners.practice: Independent forensic / clinical psychologist (since 1993) and judicial expert; Presidenta AIPJE https://www.aipje.com/directiva/ ; long-term collaborator with SEPJF http://sepjf.org/ ; private practice Diálogo Gabinete Psicológico Oviedo https://www.dialogogabinetepsicologico.com/
practitioners.regulatory_body: Colegio Oficial de Psicólogos del Principado de Asturias (COP-Asturias); Mediación familiar via Universidad de Oviedo (2009); psychology licence Universidad de Granada (1986)
practitioners.specialty: Psicología jurídica y forense; SAP / interferencias parentales; perital reports for Spanish courts; mediación familiar
practitioners.stance_source: Tejedor, El Síndrome de Alienación Parental — una forma de maltrato (EOS, re-edition https://www.dialogogabinetepsicologico.com/publicaciones/) ; PIVIP — Programa de Intervención para Víctimas de Interferencias Parentales (EOS Colección Psicología Jurídica 15, ISBN 978-84-9727-497-5) https://www.agapea.com/Asuncion-Tejedor-Huerta/Programa-de-Intervencion-para-Victimas-de-Interferencias-Parentales-PIVIP--9788497274975-i.htm ; AIPJE presidency https://www.aipje.com/directiva/ ; SEPJF programme http://sepjf.org/avance-de-programa-2/
programs_or_publications: PIVIP — one of the few structured European intervention protocols for parental-interference cases
El Síndrome de Alienación Parental — una forma de maltrato (EOS, multiple editions)
Presidenta AIPJE; long-time SEPJF collaborator
Recurring expert witness in Spanish family-court cases
practitioners.primary_contact: Diálogo Gabinete Psicológico, Oviedo — contact form https://www.dialogogabinetepsicologico.com/ ; AIPJE board page https://www.aipje.com/directiva/
practitioners.hook: Spanish-speaking world's leading PA-recognition clinician and author of PIVIP protocol. Cross-listed in /influencers/asuncion-tejedor.md.
practitioners.notes: Operates in jurisdiction where Ministry of Equality 2020 informe rejects SAP but Tribunal Supremo case-law (STS 519/2017) leaves clinical use of interferencias parentales possible with independent evidence — PIVIP positioned in that gap.

practitioners.name: José Manuel Aguilar Cuenca
practitioners.practice: Clinical and forensic psychologist; university teacher of forensic psychology; research director in Andalucía for international consulting on family/custody; private forensic-psychology practice
practitioners.regulatory_body: Colegio Oficial de Psicólogos — provincial Colegio of registration not publicly confirmed (likely Madrid or Andalucía)
practitioners.specialty: Clinical and forensic psychology; Síndrome de Alienación Parental (SAP); custodia compartida; abuso de influencia
practitioners.stance_source: Aguilar, S.A.P. Síndrome de Alienación Parental — Hijos manipulados por un cónyuge para odiar al otro (Almuzara 2004, 6th edition) https://jmaguilar.com/sindrome-alienacion-parental-6-edicion/ ; Guía para la evaluación del SAP (Síntesis, for Defensor del Menor de la Comunidad de Madrid) ; APFS interview https://apfs.es/jose-manuel-aguilar-psicologo-forense-los-hijos-no-son-propiedad-de-nadie/
programs_or_publications: S.A.P. Síndrome de Alienación Parental (2004, 6 editions) — first and most-cited Spanish-language book on SAP
Guía para la evaluación del SAP (Síntesis) for Defensor del Menor de la Comunidad de Madrid
Con mamá y con papá; Abuso de Influencia (Almuzara)
practitioners.primary_contact: Via https://jmaguilar.com/ contact form
practitioners.hook: Author whose 2004 book made SAP a household phrase in Spanish; primary citation in any Spanish family-court PA argument.
practitioners.notes: Operates against the 2020 Ministry of Equality informe rejection; politically contested. Public-facing site is cleanest verification source.

practitioners.name: Dr Adolfo Jarne Esparcia
practitioners.practice: Doctor en psicología (UB); professor of Psicopatología, Dept Psicología Clínica i Psicobiologia, Facultad de Psicología UB; forensic psychologist; private practice Gabinete de Psicología Granollers https://gabinetepsicologiagranollers.com/quienes-somos-3/adolfo-jarne-esparcia/
practitioners.regulatory_body: Col·legi Oficial de Psicologia de Catalunya (COPC) https://www.copc.cat/
practitioners.specialty: Clinical and forensic psychology; psicopatología; daño psicológico y sus secuelas; critical/methodological assessment of the SAP construct in forensic settings
practitioners.stance_source: Arch, Molina & Jarne (2008) Aceptación y controversia del SAP, Revista del Col·legi Oficial de Psicòlegs de Catalunya ; Jarne & Arch (2009) DSM, salud mental y SAP, Papeles del Psicólogo — both summarised https://dialnet.unirioja.es/servlet/articulo?codigo=8757955 and https://psykebase.es/servlet/articulo?codigo=3317394 ; UB Anuario article https://revistes.ub.edu/index.php/Anuario-psicologia/article/view/anpsic2021.51.1
programs_or_publications: Jarne & Arch (2009) Papeles del Psicólogo on DSM and SAP — cautious forensic use only with corroborating evidence
Arch, Molina & Jarne (2008) acceptance and controversy of SAP in COPC journal
UB Anuario article on minors' autonomy in divorce
practitioners.primary_contact: UB institutional email via https://www.ub.edu/ ; Gabinete Granollers https://gabinetepsicologiagranollers.com/
practitioners.hook: Spanish-language academic middle-camp voice; useful when neither full recognition (Tejedor/Aguilar) nor full critique (Escudero) is wanted.
practitioners.notes: Position is methodological rather than ideological; cite as a corrective when recognition camp over-claims diagnostic certainty.

practitioners.name: Dr Antonio Escudero Nafs
practitioners.practice: Psiquiatra infanto-juvenil; coordinator Child and Adolescent Programme, Centro de Salud Mental de Majadahonda (since 2005), Hospital Universitario Puerta de Hierro-Majadahonda public system; ResearchGate https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Antonio-Escudero-Nafs-3
practitioners.regulatory_body: Colegio Oficial de Médicos de Madrid (OMC) — spécialité psiquiatría / psiquiatría infantil
practitioners.specialty: Child and adolescent psychiatry; critique of SAP as pseudoscientific construct dangerous to children in family-violence contexts
practitioners.stance_source: Escudero, Aguilar Redo & de la Cruz (2008) La lógica del SAP de Gardner: 'terapia de la amenaza', Revista AEN 28(2) https://scielo.isciii.es/scielo.php?script=sci_arttext&pid=S0211-57352008000200004 ; same-issue editorial https://scielo.isciii.es/scielo.php?script=sci_arttext&pid=S0211-57352008000200001 ; AEN public statement of support after 2019 Infancia Libre controversy https://www.elsaltodiario.com/infancia/asociacion-espanola-neuropsiquiatria-sap-antonio-escudero-nafs-infancia-libre ; Ministry of Equality 2020 informe reproduces framework https://violenciagenero.igualdad.gob.es/wp-content/uploads/ALIENACIONPARENTAL_cap2_lib7.pdf
programs_or_publications: Escudero, Aguilar Redo & de la Cruz (2008) — seminal Spanish-language SAP critique
Co-architect of Spanish Ministry of Equality 2020 SAP working-group framework
Coordinator Programa Infanto-Juvenil CSM Majadahonda (public mental-health service)
practitioners.primary_contact: Via Hospital Universitario Puerta de Hierro-Majadahonda https://www.comunidad.madrid/hospital/puertadehierromajadahonda/ ; CSM Majadahonda
practitioners.hook: Single most-cited Spanish-language critical-camp clinical voice; architect of Spanish government's institutional rejection of SAP; centre of the high-profile Infancia Libre controversy.
practitioners.notes: Politically charged in Spanish context; AEN 2019 statement of support is cleanest institutional anchor.

practitioners.name: Prof Giovanni Battista Camerini, MD
practitioners.practice: Neuropsichiatra infantile, psichiatra, psicoterapeuta; private practice Bologna; former lecturer Università di Padova and Sapienza Roma; teacher in Scuole di Specializzazione (Modena/Bologna) and master programmes (Padova/Sapienza/Pontificia Salesiana)
practitioners.regulatory_body: Ordine dei Medici Chirurghi e Odontoiatri (FNOMCeO) — specialità neuropsichiatria infantile / psichiatria
practitioners.specialty: Child neuropsychiatry; forensic psychiatry of developmental age; assessment of parental skills (APS-I); alienazione parentale
practitioners.stance_source: Camerini, Pingitore & Lopez (2016) Alienazione parentale: innovazioni cliniche e giuridiche (Franco Angeli) http://www.alienazione.genitoriale.com/libro-alienazione-parentale-innovazioni-cliniche-e-giuridiche-camerini-pingitore-lopez-2016/ ; Camerini & Pingitore (2015) https://genitorisottratti.it/2015/06/03/alienazione-parentale-camerini-pingitore/ ; Manuale per la valutazione delle competenze genitoriali APS-I (Maggioli 2019) ; Panorama interview Orfani d'amore 17 Sep 2025 https://www.alienazione.genitoriale.com/orfani-damore-terry-marocco-panorama-17-9-2025/
programs_or_publications: APS-I Italian-language structured interview for parental-skills assessment (Maggioli 2019)
Camerini, Pingitore & Lopez (2016) Alienazione parentale: innovazioni cliniche e giuridiche (Franco Angeli)
Teaching role in master programmes at Sapienza/Padova/Salesiana
practitioners.primary_contact: https://giovannibattistacamerini.it/ contact channel ; Psicologia.io profile https://www.psicologia.io/user/49827
practitioners.hook: Senior Italian neuropsichiatra infantile on the recognition side; APS-I and Franco Angeli volume are load-bearing Italian clinical references. Must be read against Cass. ord. 9691/2022 Massaro and ord. 4595/2025.
practitioners.notes: Operates in jurisdiction where Cassazione has twice (2022, 2025) ruled PA is not a clinically validated construct binding judges — current Italian use of framework must be evidentially anchored independently.

practitioners.name: Prof Maria Cristina Verrocchio, PhD
practitioners.practice: Professore Ordinario of Clinical Psychology, Università G. d'Annunzio Chieti-Pescara; psicologa e psicoterapeuta; PASG member
practitioners.regulatory_body: Ordine degli Psicologi della Regione Abruzzo (Sez. A psicologa-psicoterapeuta)
practitioners.specialty: Clinical psychology; forensic clinical psychology; parental alienation as psychological child abuse in Baker/Bernet framework; long-term mental-health outcomes of PA
practitioners.stance_source: Baker & Verrocchio (2013) Italian college students' recollections of parental alienation, Children and Youth Services Review — Italian summary http://www.alienazione.genitoriale.com/studi-empirici-sullalienazione-parentale-in-italia-maria-cristina-verrocchio-universita-di-chieti/ ; Verrocchio & Marchetti L'intervento nei casi di alienazione genitoriale https://www.alienazione.genitoriale.com/lintervento-nei-casi-di-alienazione-genitoriale-maria-cristina-verrocchio-daniela-marchetti/ ; AIPG profile https://aipgitalia.org/teams/maria-cristina-verrocchio/
programs_or_publications: Baker & Verrocchio (2013) first peer-reviewed Italian-sample PA mental-health study (n=257 Chieti)
Verrocchio & Marchetti Italian-language intervention guidance
Verrocchio / Baker / Bernet collaborative outputs across 2010s
practitioners.primary_contact: UniCh institutional email via https://www.unich.it/ ; LinkedIn DM
practitioners.hook: Principal Italian academic-clinician operating inside PASG (Baker/Bernet) recognition framework; Chieti-sample data is the Italian recognition camp's most-cited empirical study.
practitioners.notes: Italian recognition-camp work is now read in the shadow of Cass. ord. 9691/2022 and ord. 4595/2025.

practitioners.name: Prof Marisa Malagoli Togliatti
practitioners.practice: Professore Ordinario di Psicodinamica dello Sviluppo e delle Relazioni Familiari, Facoltà di Medicina e Psicologia, Sapienza Università di Roma (since 1996); Director Centro di Ricerca in Psicologia Clinica Sapienza; psicologa e psicoterapeuta
practitioners.regulatory_body: Ordine degli Psicologi del Lazio (Sez. A) https://ordinepsicologilazio.it/
practitioners.specialty: Family psychology; psychodynamics of family relationships; alienazione genitoriale (empirical research, diagnosis, psychological treatment); psychology-and-law
practitioners.stance_source: Malagoli Togliatti & Lavadera, Alienazione genitoriale: ricerca empirica, diagnosi e trattamento psicologico (Raffaello Cortina) https://www.raffaellocortina.it/autore-marisa-malagoli-togliatti-2007.html ; Lavadera, Ferracuti & Togliatti La PAS nelle sentenze italiane http://www.alienazione.genitoriale.com/pas-italia/ ; Treccani interview https://www.treccani.it/magazine/atlante/societa/la-psicologia-che-entra-nel-diritto-intervista-a-marisa-malagoli-togliatti/
programs_or_publications: Alienazione genitoriale: ricerca empirica, diagnosi e trattamento psicologico (Raffaello Cortina, with Lavadera)
La PAS nelle sentenze italiane (with Lavadera & Ferracuti) — content analysis of Italian PAS case-law
Direction Centro di Ricerca in Psicologia Clinica Sapienza
practitioners.primary_contact: Sapienza institutional email via https://www.uniroma1.it/ ; Raffaello Cortina editorial channel
practitioners.hook: Sapienza academic anchor of Italian recognition camp; Raffaello Cortina volume + PAS-in-judgments content analysis are principal Italian-language academic references.
practitioners.notes: Co-authoring relationship with Lubrano Lavadera makes them a Sapienza pair on this topic.

practitioners.name: Dr Anna Lubrano Lavadera, PhD
practitioners.practice: Psicologa e psicoterapeuta; consulente del Tribunale Ordinario di Roma; contract lecturer LUMSA Università di Roma Dip. Scienze Umane (Psicologia Sociale, Forense e Organizzativa); affiliated researcher Dip. Psicologia Dinamica e Clinica Sapienza; Centro Psicologia ERA
practitioners.regulatory_body: Ordine degli Psicologi del Lazio (Sez. A) — registered since 11 October 2001 per official Albo page
practitioners.registration_number: Searchable on Ordine Psicologi Lazio Albo (specific number on registry page)
practitioners.specialty: Forensic and clinical psychology; rifiuto genitoriale / rottura delle relazioni genitore-figlio in situazioni ad alta conflittualità; coalizioni genitoriali; perital reports for Tribunale di Roma
practitioners.stance_source: Lubrano Lavadera, Curare la rottura delle relazioni genitore-figlio (2017) and Prevenire e curare la rottura delle relazioni genitore-figli (ed.) — Raffaello Cortina https://www.raffaellocortina.it/autore-anna-lubrano-lavadera-2023.html ; Caratteristiche individuali e dinamiche relazionali nel rifiuto genitoriale (2016) https://www.researchgate.net/publication/279514552 ; Lavadera, Ferracuti & Togliatti La PAS nelle sentenze italiane http://www.alienazione.genitoriale.com/pas-italia/ ; LUMSA https://lumsa.it/it/docenti/anna-lubrano-lavadera
programs_or_publications: Curare la rottura delle relazioni genitore-figlio nelle situazioni ad alta conflittualità (2017)
Prevenire e curare la rottura delle relazioni genitore-figli in situazioni di separazione o divorzio (ed.)
La PAS nelle sentenze italiane (with Togliatti & Ferracuti)
Permanent CTU role Tribunale di Roma
practitioners.primary_contact: LUMSA institutional email via https://lumsa.it/it/docenti/anna-lubrano-lavadera ; Centro Psicologia ERA https://www.centropsicologiaera.it/team/anna-lubrano-lavadera/
practitioners.hook: Rome forensic-academic anchor — combines Sapienza research lineage with active CTU practice at Tribunale di Roma. Italian counterpart to UK's Karen Woodall.
practitioners.notes: Brief listed her as 'Lavadera Anna Laura' — correct full name verified as Anna Lubrano Lavadera per Ordine Psicologi Lazio Albo and LUMSA.

practitioners.name: Dr Justine van Lawick
practitioners.practice: Clinical psychologist, family therapist, director of training at LORENTZHUIS (Haarlem, co-founded 1984) https://www.lorentzhuis.nl/ ; Taos Institute Associate; co-developer of Kinderen uit de Knel / No Kids in the Middle
practitioners.regulatory_body: BIG-register (Wet BIG) as Klinisch psycholoog / Psychotherapeut https://www.bigregister.nl/ ; NVRG-erkend systeemtherapeut / opleider (Nederlandse Vereniging voor Relatie- en Gezinstherapie)
practitioners.specialty: Systemic family therapy; vechtscheiding (high-conflict divorce); multi-family group therapy; demonisation patterns in couples and families
practitioners.stance_source: Van Lawick & Visser (2015) No Kids in the Middle: Dialogical and Creative Work with Parents and Children in the Context of High Conflict Divorces, ANZJFT https://www.researchgate.net/publication/273477415 ; Visser et al. (2021) Group Therapy for High-Conflict Divorce: The 'No Kids in the Middle' Intervention Programme https://www.researchgate.net/publication/348979513 ; Kinderen uit de Knel https://www.researchgate.net/publication/286921968 ; Routledge https://www.routledge.com/Group-Therapy-for-High-Conflict-Divorce-The-No-Kids-in-the-Middle-Intervention-Programme/Visser-vanLawick/p/book/9780367109233
programs_or_publications: Kinderen uit de Knel / No Kids in the Middle — flagship Dutch multi-family group intervention for high-conflict divorce; delivered across NL, licensed internationally
Visser & van Lawick (Routledge 2019) Group Therapy for High-Conflict Divorce
Multiple Karnac/Routledge monographs on systemic violence work
Co-founder Lorentzhuis (1984)
practitioners.primary_contact: Lorentzhuis https://www.lorentzhuis.nl/ (Haarlem) ; Taos Institute profile https://www.taosinstitute.net/about-us/people/institute-associates/europe/netherlands/m-j-van-lawick
practitioners.hook: Single most operationally significant Dutch contribution to PA / high-conflict-divorce field. Not PASG-aligned; explicitly avoids alienator/alienated labelling.
practitioners.notes: Recommended bridge clinician — engages PA dynamics inside multi-family-group, non-blame frame; adopted by Dutch youth-care services (De Viersprong evaluation).

practitioners.name: Dr Sietske Dijkstra, PhD
practitioners.practice: Founder/director Bureau Dijkstra (since 1998) — practice-oriented research, training, advice and (since 2019) coaching for alienated parents and youth, Utrecht; former Professor of Domestic Violence & Interagency Work Avans UAS (until 2014); commission member Schadefonds Geweldsmisdrijven since September 2021
practitioners.regulatory_body: PhD social sciences; works as practice-oriented researcher/trainer/coach rather than BIG-registered clinical psychologist — regulatory status outside BIG psychotherapy track
practitioners.specialty: Coercive control; domestic violence; ouderverstoting framed as outcome of coercive-control patterns by one parent; multidisciplinary professional training
practitioners.stance_source: Dijkstra (2022) 'I see a wall and then I cannot reach my son': Coercive control tactics by one parent alienate the child from the other, Journal of Gender-Based Violence ; Hoe herken en doorzie je een instrumenteel geweldspatroon? (2020) https://www.researchgate.net/publication/342355672 ; Sozio (2020) special issue https://www.sozio.nl/literatuurlijst---sozio-special-hg-2020---ouderverstoting-sietske-dijkstra/1029446 ; RINO-Groep interview https://www.rinogroep.nl/interview/331/meer-zicht-op-geweldspatronen-verbetert-de-hulp-bij-complexe-scheidingen.html
programs_or_publications: Coercive control tactics by one parent alienate the child from the other (JGBV 2022) — rare European study applying coercive-control theory to alienation outcomes symmetrically
Bureau Dijkstra coaching offer for alienated parents and youth (since 2019)
Sozio special issue editor/contributor on huiselijk geweld en ouderverstoting (2020)
Schadefonds Geweldsmisdrijven commission member
practitioners.primary_contact: Contact form https://sietske-dijkstra.nl/ ; Bureau Dijkstra Utrecht
practitioners.hook: European coercive-control bridge clinician; what serious PA-recognition advocates have to answer to be credible on family-violence intersections. Cross-listed in /influencers/sietske-dijkstra.md.
practitioners.notes: Not BIG-registered as clinical psychologist — operates as researcher/trainer/coach; that positioning is part of why she is treated as middle-camp bridge rather than treating clinician.

practitioners.name: Drs Joep Choy
practitioners.practice: Psychologist (since 1976), psychotherapist, relationship/family therapist, divorce mediator; partner/director Choy Consultants https://www.choyconsultants.nl/ ; former head MOB Haarlem (1978-1983); former Chairman Triversum (child/adolescent psychiatric hospital Alkmaar 1983-1998); active educator in postdoctoral/masterclass training
practitioners.regulatory_body: BIG-register (Wet BIG) as Psychotherapeut — verify https://www.bigregister.nl/ ; educator role under NVRG/NVO postdoctoral training
practitioners.specialty: Systems thinking applied to families, organisations and echtscheidingsbemiddeling; relationship and family therapy; systeemtherapie education
practitioners.stance_source: Choy DVD Interventies in echtscheidingsbemiddeling (demonstration DVD listed at https://www.choyconsultants.nl/boeken/ik-wil-systeem-denken/) ; 80+ articles and 8 books on systems work; Masterclass Familie en Familiebedrijf https://masterclass-psychologie.nl/cursus/masterclass-familie-en-familiebedrijf-met-joep-choy/ ; consistently frames ouderverstoting as downstream result of disturbed parent-couple relating rather than as Gardnerian syndrome
programs_or_publications: 80+ articles, 8 books; De Vraag op het Antwoord nominated book of the year 2005 (Order of Organizational Advisors)
Postdoctoral masterclasses on systems therapy in family/divorce mediation
Former chair Triversum (Alkmaar)
practitioners.primary_contact: Choy Consultants https://www.choyconsultants.nl/
practitioners.hook: Senior Dutch systems-therapy voice; useful for non-PASG Dutch clinical authority on high-conflict divorce outranking van Lawick on seniority but not on programme reach.
practitioners.notes: Long career; PA-specific peer-reviewed publication record thinner than van Lawick's — Tier 2 reflects that.

practitioners.name: Prof Dr Catrin Finkenauer
practitioners.practice: Hoogleraar Jeugdstudies (Professor of Youth Studies), Dept Interdisciplinary Social Science, Universiteit Utrecht; lead UU divorce-and-family dossier
practitioners.regulatory_body: Academic (social-psychology PhD); not BIG-registered as clinician
practitioners.specialty: Interpersonal relationships; youth studies; divorce dynamics, parent-child relationships, coparenting and ouderverstoting; impact of bitter divorces on children
practitioners.stance_source: Finkenauer De knel van ouderverstoting – over de complexe dynamiek van geblokkeerde ouder-kind relaties, Systeemtherapie 35(1) https://www.tijdschriftsysteemtherapie.nl/inhoud/tijdschrift_artikel/ST-35-1-08/ ; UU press release Bitter divorces have limited influence on quality of children's lives https://www.uu.nl/en/news/bitter-divorces-have-limited-influence-on-quality-of-childrens-lives ; collaborative work with Margreet Visser & Esther Kluwer on Kinderen uit de Knel follow-up (De Viersprong https://deviersprong.nl/over-de-viersprong/over-de-viersprong-onderzoek/vechtscheidingsbehandeling-kinderen-uit-de-knel)
programs_or_publications: De knel van ouderverstoting (Systeemtherapie 2023/2024)
UU divorce-and-family research dossier (multi-year)
Collaborator on De Viersprong evaluation of Kinderen uit de Knel
practitioners.primary_contact: C.Finkenauer@uu.nl (UU staff page https://www.uu.nl/staff/CFinkenauer)
practitioners.hook: Senior Dutch academic voice on divorce-and-family research; useful for 'research evidence base' line in any Dutch PA conversation and for tempering recognition-camp claims about scale of harm.
practitioners.notes: UU press line 'bitter divorces have limited influence on quality of children's lives' is clean counterpoint to PA-catastrophising; cite carefully.

practitioners.name: Benoît Van Dieren
practitioners.practice: Psychologist, psychotherapist and family mediator; teaching/training role on parental alienation and parent-child collaboration expertise at Université Catholique de Louvain (UCLouvain); 10+ years of psycho-legal expertise practice on severe separation conflicts, especially rupture/risk of rupture of parent-child bond
practitioners.regulatory_body: Commission des psychologues / Psychologencommissie de Belgique https://www.compsy.be/ — searchable register
practitioners.specialty: Psycho-legal expertise in child-custody disputes; family mediation; parental-collaboration expertise model; PA in severe separation conflicts
practitioners.stance_source: Van Dieren, M. de Hemptinne & J.-L. Renchon, Le risque de rupture du lien parent-enfant et l'expertise centrée sur la collaboration parentale, Revue trimestrielle de droit familial (PFWB catalogue https://documentation.pfwb.be/index.php?lvl=notice_display&id=171078) ; La Mouette Belgique conference Prévention de l'aliénation parentale March 2005 https://sites.google.com/site/lamouettebelgique/conferences/prevention-de-l-alienation-parentale---par-benoit-van-dieren---mars-2005 ; CNQ Quebec carrefour PA (Belgian-Quebec collaboration) https://www.cnq.org/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/127817-6_Carrefour-Alienation-Parentale.pdf
programs_or_publications: Van Dieren, de Hemptinne & Renchon — Le risque de rupture du lien parent-enfant et l'expertise centrée sur la collaboration parentale
2005 conférence Prévention de l'aliénation parentale (La Mouette Belgique)
Long-term teaching contribution at UCLouvain in psycho-legal expertise
practitioners.primary_contact: Via UCLouvain Faculty of Psychology https://uclouvain.be/fr/facultes/psp ; via ACALPA partnership https://www.acalpa.info/
practitioners.hook: Principal Belgian francophone PA-recognition expert; brings parental-collaboration expertise model that Belgian Justice Ministry has at least gestured toward (Brussels Times https://www.brusselstimes.com/all-news/belgium-all-news/108061/).
practitioners.notes: Brief flagged as unverified — now verified via PFWB documentation catalogue (peer-reviewed journal entry), La Mouette Belgique conference archive and CNQ Quebec collaboration. Independent practice URL still not publicly confirmed; outreach via UCLouvain or ACALPA.

honest_gaps: DE: no critique-camp practising clinician at directory standard — German critique runs through legal academics and feminist NGOs rather than named clinicians
FR: Berger is the sole verified critique-camp clinician at Tier 1; FENAMEF / Fondation pour l'Enfance pool needs follow-up
IT: zero critique-camp clinicians at directory standard — Italian critique runs through Cassazione case-law (ord. 9691/2022, ord. 4595/2025) and legal scholarship
BE: only one entry at directory standard; Yapaka, Femmes de Droit and Code analyses need follow-up pass
NL: no critique-camp clinician at directory standard — closest is Dijkstra in middle-camp; Dutch critique runs through Schadefonds compensation case-law

excluded_practitioners.name: Werner Bartens
excluded_practitioners.reason: Qualified MD but practising as Süddeutsche Zeitung science editor, not as psychiatrist/psychotherapist; belongs in journalists list

excluded_practitioners.name: Antonella Boschi

excluded_practitioners.regulatory_disclosure: Ordine degli Psicologi search returns no PA-active practitioner matching name

excluded_practitioners.name: Liesbet Nieuwenhuys
excluded_practitioners.reason: No Belgian Commission des psychologues entry or PA-relevant professional profile found under that exact spelling; several similar-named Belgian psychologists exist (Nijssens, Goubert, De Kock, Smedts, Plissart) — none with PA/family-court specialty
excluded_practitioners.regulatory_disclosure: Commission des psychologues search inconclusive; request more specific identifier

excluded_practitioners.name: Marc Lormans
excluded_practitioners.reason: No Belgian register entry, publication or named press coverage found connecting a 'Marc Lormans' to parental alienation or family-court practice
excluded_practitioners.regulatory_disclosure: Commission des psychologues search inconclusive; request more specific identifier
